# Introduction

<!-- EDITORIAL REWRITE (HVD 2.0 migration) — legacy maturity framing removed and operator scope rewritten for the shared Terraform Administration Guide. Please review. -->

The Terraform Administration Guide is for platform teams operating HCP Terraform or Terraform Enterprise as a shared service. It assumes the Terraform platform is already available: HCP Terraform is provided by HashiCorp as SaaS, and Terraform Enterprise self-hosted deployments have completed the [Installation Guide](/validated-designs/terraform/installation-guide/introduction).

Use this guide for day-2 service management: people and process, operating models, organization/project/workspace design, identity and access management, audit and observability, support readiness, self-hosted agent operations, and operator-owned setup for shared capabilities such as private registry, policy as code, run tasks, and no-code provisioning.

<Note>

Terraform Enterprise-only operations, including backup, restore, failover, and self-hosted infrastructure responsibilities, are marked explicitly. HCP Terraform is operated by HashiCorp; HCP-specific guidance is called out inline where relevant.

</Note>

For practitioner workflows such as infrastructure provisioning, imports, private-registry consumption, policy enforcement during runs, run-task results, continuous validation, workspace notifications, no-code module consumption, and ephemeral workspaces, see the [Terraform User Guide](/validated-designs/terraform/user-guide/introduction).
